scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp ../chat.html public/index.html && node scripts/build-graph.mjs
scripts.dev:setup: mkdir -p public && cp ../chat.html public/index.html && node scripts/build-graph.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run dev:setup && (npx chokidar-cli "../chat.html" -c "npm run dev:setup" & npx wrangler dev)
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
